name: cross-session-memory-bridge
description: Repo-local Codex plugin wrapper for the cross-session memory bridge.

interface.longDescription: Postgres-backed memory, compaction, checkpointing, and context briefs that keep long coding sessions coherent while reducing token spend.
defaultPrompt: Search project memory before we start changing code.
Build a context brief for this task from prior sessions.
Show the current context pressure before we continue.
